title: Can AI really simulate human thinking? Research casts doubt on an influential study, suggesting an advanced model was just really good at memorizing patterns.
summary: A study published in July 2025 claimed the Centaur AI model could simulate and predict human behavior with astonishing accuracy. A counter study raises doubts.
author: Owen Hughes

title: Drones are becoming too smart to crash
summary: MIT researchers have developed MIGHTY, an open-source system that enables autonomous drones to navigate dangerous environments with greater speed and precision. Combining LiDAR, onboard AI, and advanced trajectory planning, MIGHTY allows drones to dodge obstacles in milliseconds while maintaining smooth flight.

Summary:
I love Notebook LM, and I use it all the time, but there's one issue that's always been pretty annoying. When you generate detailed infographics there's almost always misspellings and jumbled text. I found a surprisingly easy way to fix them.
